{{Quote|Yeah, well, when the citizens of Rampa 1 heard about what was going on, they rose up, too. For all the good it's gonna do 'em.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]|<ref name="THG" />}}
'''Rampa 1''',<ref name="THG" /> also known as '''Rampa I''',<ref name="FLT">''[[Friends Like These]]''</ref> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="RD">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref> located in the [[Rampa Minor system/Legends|Rampa Minor system]], within the [[Baxel sector/Legends|Baxel sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
{{Quote|Saw plenty of action with the 9th Engineering Battalion, mostly in the Western Reaches, but the massacre at Rampa I and what they did on Gall was just too much.|[[Lira Hardin/Legends|Lira Hardin]]|<ref name="FLT" />}}
In [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the populace of Rampa 1 [[Rampa 1 uprising|rebelled]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], following the [[Rampa 2 uprising|example]] of [[Rampa 2]].<ref name="THG" /> Both locales were violently subjugated by the Empire.<ref name="RD" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Since Hutt Space is out here in the Rim, far from 'civilization'—that is, Coruscant—I'd bet Sarn Shild got stuck with all the older ships and weaponry, while all the newest, best stuff went to Rampa 1 and Rampa 2.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]|<ref name="THG" />}}
Rampa 1 was first mentioned in the [[1997]] novel ''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'', the second volume of ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Trilogy]]'' written by [[A. C. Crispin]].<ref name="THG" /> It was mentioned again in the [[1998]] novel ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'', the third volume of the trilogy.<ref name="RD" />

The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' created the [[Rampa Minor system/Legends|Rampa Minor system]] to differentiate Rampa 1 and Rampa 2 from [[Rampa III]], a planet introduced in [[Brian Daley]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]'', establishing that they are not in the same [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="TEA" />

Though ''The Essential Atlas'' places the Rampa Minor system rimward of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]],<ref name="TEA" /> comments made by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] during the events of ''The Hutt Gambit'' seem to imply that both Rampa 1 and Rampa 2 are not located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] but rather closer to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and civilization.<ref name="THG" />
